description_html:
Participants create a complete artwork using ONE continuous line while listening to music.
The line must flow with the rhythm, mood, and emotion of the music—no lifting the pen/brush at any point.

Rules:

  • This is a solo participation event only.
  • Each participant must use only one continuous line for the entire artwork.
  • Lifting the pen or brush is strictly not allowed once drawing starts.
  • Only one pen or brush may be used throughout the event.
  • No erasing, overwriting, or corrections are permitted.
  • Participants must create the artwork while music is playing.
  • The artwork should reflect the emotion and rhythm of the music.
  • No rulers, stencils, or guiding tools are allowed.
  • Participants must stop immediately when the time limit ends.
  • Artworks that do not follow the event rules may not be considered for final evaluation.

Note:

  • If time is left, participants can paint inside the one continuous line, but the line must remain clearly visible and unbroken.
  • For the continuous line, participants may use either a pen (or) a brush any one of their choice.
  • Materials will be provided.
location: Indian Institute of Information Technology Design and Manufacturing, Kancheepuram
